source_jobs.title: Staff React Native Engineer ($300k - 500k salary)
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Baton Corporation is the development company that builds and operates the entire technology stack behind pump.fun http://pump.fun, the largest memecoin launchpad in production today. The systems are low latency, high throughput, live under constant load, and break if you get them wrong.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

As a React Native Engineer on our mobile team, you’ll play a pivotal role in building and scaling our mobile application, bringing the power of crypto and SocialFi to users worldwide. You’ll work across the stack to craft high-performance, seamless mobile experiences, shipping fast and iterating rapidly in a high-growth environment.

 - Build and maintain a world-class mobile application using React Native, ensuring smooth performance and an intuitive user experience.

 - Optimise for speed, efficiency, and scalability, creating a seamless bridge between blockchain interactions and mobile-first design.

 - Work closely with backend engineers to integrate APIs, real-time data streams, and decentralised technologies.

 - Iterate quickly—shipping features, gathering feedback, and refining the mobile experience to drive engagement and retention.

 - Solve complex technical challenges related to crypto wallets, smart contract interactions, and real-time data updates.

 - Maintain a clean, modular, and scalable codebase while pushing the boundaries of mobile development.

 - Collaborate with designers, engineers, and product leaders to shape the future of our mobile platform.




WHO YOU ARE

 - A React Native specialist with a strong track record of building and deploying mobile applications at scale

 - Proficient in React Native and mobile development best practices, with a deep understanding of performance optimisation

 - Comfortable working across the mobile stack, integrating native modules and optimising for iOS and Android

 - Passionate about crypto, DeFi, and blockchain (or highly motivated to dive in)

 - Ideally an active contributor to open source react native projects

 - A fast-moving, problem-solving engineer who thrives in an environment where speed and impact matter

 - High-agency and ownership-driven, capable of leading features end-to-end with minimal guidance

 - Experienced in high-growth startups or fast-paced product teams, where iteration speed and user feedback drive decision-making

 - Excited to be part of a world-class engineering team, building the next generation of mobile-first crypto applications




WHAT IT'S LIKE TO WORK HERE

 - We work in person

 - Hours can be long and unconventional

 - The pace is intense

 - Expectations are high, and impact is immediate

 - Working at Baton is not for everyone




WHY JOIN US?

 - Unmatched ownership and autonomy

 - Exposure to systems operating at the edge of crypto scale

 - The ability to ship fast and see real-world impact immediately



If you’re motivated by responsibility, speed, and building products used by massive audiences, you’ll feel at home here.

source_jobs.title: Junior Full Stack Engineer ($250k - $300k salary)
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Baton Corporation is the development company that builds and operates the entire technology stack behind pump.fun http://pump.fun, the largest memecoin launchpad in production today. The systems are low latency, high throughput, live under constant load, and break if you get them wrong.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

As a Full Stack Engineer at Baton, you’ll work on production systems operating at real scale, alongside a team of highly experienced engineers. This is a hands-on role with immediate responsibility and fast feedback.

 - Build, ship, and iterate on production features that reach hundreds of thousands of users

 - Work across the stack, from backend services and data pipelines to frontend interfaces, gaining deep exposure to how large systems are built and operated

 - Learn to design for performance, reliability, and scalability by working on systems under real-world load

 - Prototype quickly, test ideas with real users, and refine based on data rather than opinion

 - Tackle ambiguous, technically challenging problems and learn to reason from first principles with guidance from experienced engineers

 - Collaborate closely with a small, high-caliber team where code quality, clarity of thought, and execution speed matter

 - Own features end to end, from initial idea and implementation through deployment, monitoring, and iteration




WHO YOU ARE

 - An exceptional early-career engineer with a strong foundation in computer science and the ability to ramp quickly on new systems and codebases

 - Studied at a top university or demonstrated equivalent ability through competitive programming, Olympiads, open-source contributions, or substantial personal projects

 - Comfortable working across the stack, with hands-on experience in technologies like TypeScript, React, Next.js, and Node.js (or adjacent modern frameworks)

 - Curious and intellectually rigorous - you enjoy understanding why systems work, not just how to use them

 - A strong problem solver who can break down ambiguous problems, reason from first principles, and iterate toward solid solutions

 - High-agency and ownership-oriented, eager to take responsibility for features end-to-end while learning from more experienced engineers

 - Motivated by fast feedback, real users, and an environment where what you ship matters immediately

 - Hungry to learn from exceptional peers and grow rapidly by working on challenging problems at real scale




WHAT IT'S LIKE TO WORK HERE

 - We work in person

 - Hours can be long and unconventional

 - The pace is intense

 - Expectations are high, and impact is immediate

 - Working at Baton is not for everyone




WHY JOIN US?

 - Unmatched ownership and autonomy

 - Exposure to systems operating at the edge of crypto scale

 - The ability to ship fast and see real-world impact immediately

If you’re motivated by responsibility, speed, and building products used by massive audiences, you’ll feel at home here.

source_jobs.title: Staff Solana Program Engineer ($300 - $500k salary)
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Baton Corporation is the development company that builds and operates the entire technology stack behind pump.fun http://pump.fun, the largest memecoin launchpad in production today. The systems are low latency, high throughput, live under constant load, and break if you get them wrong.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

You’ll design, build, and maintain on-chain programs that operate under heavy real-world load. This is a hands-on role with real ownership and immediate impact.

 - Design and implement high-performance Solana programs in Rust that handle significant transaction volume

 - Reason carefully about program correctness, security, and upgradeability in a production environment

 - Optimise compute usage, account layouts, and transaction flows for latency and throughput

 - Work closely with backend and frontend engineers to design clean on-chain / off-chain boundaries

 - Debug, test, and ship changes that go live quickly and are used by hundreds of thousands of users

 - Participate in design discussions around protocol changes, economic mechanics, and system constraints

 - Own programs end to end: from design and implementation through deployment, monitoring, and iteration




WHO YOU ARE

 - Highly experienced engineer who has deployed production smart contracts or on-chain programs that operate at meaningful scale, with real users, sustained volume, and operational constraints

 - Understand that building at scale is different from deploying isolated contracts - you’ve dealt with performance bottlenecks, edge cases, and real-world failure modes

 - Thoughtful about security, adversarial environments, and long-term maintainability

 - Able to work independently, take ownership, and make sound technical decisions with incomplete information

 - Motivated by operating real systems at scale




WHAT IT'S LIKE TO WORK HERE

 - We work in person

 - Hours can be long and unconventional

 - The pace is intense

 - Expectations are high, and impact is immediate

 - Working at Baton is not for everyone




WHY JOIN US?

 - Unmatched ownership and autonomy

 - Exposure to systems operating at the edge of crypto scale

 - The ability to ship fast and see real-world impact immediately

If you’re motivated by responsibility, speed, and building products used by massive audiences, you’ll feel at home here.

source_jobs.title: Reinforcement Learning Engineer ($400k - $800k salary)
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Baton Corporation is the development company that builds and operates the entire technology stack behind pump.fun http://pump.fun, the largest memecoin launchpad in production today. The systems are low latency, high throughput, live under constant load, and break if you get them wrong.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

As our Reinforcement Learning Engineer, you will own a production trading system that directly deploys real capital. This is not a research role - it’s about building learning systems that are robust, measurable, and safe under real-world constraints.

 - Own and ship an RL-driven trading agent using real capital to increase trading volume and user participation in a memecoin ecosystem

 - Design reward functions and policies aligned with product goals while enforcing strict downside risk constraints

 - Build evaluation and validation frameworks (simulation, offline analysis) to minimize reliance on live sequential testing

 - Safely transition an existing heuristic-based production system toward learning-based approaches

 - Take end-to-end ownership and technical leadership as the sole RL expert, from data and modeling through deployment, monitoring, and safeguards




WHO YOU ARE:

 - You have previously put an autonomous learning system into production that directly controlled capital, pricing, traffic, or resources and can explain what broke and how they fixed it

 - Have personally designed and enforced hard risk limits (capital caps, loss bounds, circuit breakers) in a live system, not just talked about “risk-aware objectives.

 - Have built a policy evaluation loop from scratch (simulators, replay, counterfactuals, shadow deployments) before trusting live rollout.

 - Can make and defend uncomfortable tradeoffs (e.g. heuristic > RL, bandit > deep RL) based on empirical results instead of ideology

 - Have operated as the single owner of a complex ML system in a small team, with no safety net of research orgs, infra teams, or “ML platforms.”




WHAT IT'S LIKE TO WORK HERE

 - We work in person

 - Hours can be long and unconventional

 - The pace is intense

 - Expectations are high, and impact is immediate

 - Working at Baton is not for everyone




WHY JOIN US?

 - Unmatched ownership and autonomy

 - Exposure to systems operating at the edge of crypto scale

 - The ability to ship fast and see real-world impact immediately

If you’re motivated by responsibility, speed, and building products used by massive audiences, you’ll feel at home here.

source_jobs.title: Staff Backend Engineer ($300k - $500k salary)
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Baton Corporation is the development company that builds and operates the entire technology stack behind pump.fun http://pump.fun, the largest memecoin launchpad in production today.

~$1B daily volume. Low latency, high throughput, constant load.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own the hardest backend problems across the system, from performance bottlenecks and scaling limits to correctness and reliability under load

 - Set technical direction for core backend systems, making principled architectural decisions that balance speed, quality, and long-term maintainability

 - Design, build, and operate distributed services that run in production and are relied on daily

 - Identify systemic issues early and drive them to resolution, even when the problems are ambiguous or cross-cutting

 - Raise the bar for backend engineering by mentoring peers, reviewing designs and code, and modelling strong engineering judgment




WHO YOU ARE

 - Have built and operated distributed systems at scale multiple times

 - Strong experience in Rust, Go, or TypeScript

 - Deep knowledge of databases and data modelling, including tradeoffs around consistency, performance, and reliability

 - Known for solving problems others couldn’t

 - High-agency and ownership-driven, able to take ambiguous problems and drive them to concrete outcomes without waiting for direction

 - Crypto experience is a plus, but not required




WHAT IT'S LIKE TO WORK HERE

 - We work in person

 - Hours can be long and unconventional

 - The pace is intense

 - Expectations are high, and impact is immediate

 - Working at Baton is not for everyone




WHY JOIN US?

 - Unmatched ownership and autonomy

 - Exposure to systems operating at the edge of crypto scale

 - The ability to ship fast and see real-world impact immediately

If you’re motivated by responsibility, speed, and building products used by massive audiences, you’ll feel at home here.

source_jobs.title: Staff Frontend Engineer ($300k - $500k salary)
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Baton Corporation is the development company that builds and operates the entire technology stack behind pump.fun http://pump.fun, the largest memecoin launchpad in production today. The systems are low latency, high throughput, live under constant load, and break if you get them wrong.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

As a Staff Frontend Engineer, you’ll own the design and evolution of large parts of our frontend architecture. This is a hands-on, high-impact role focused on building fast, reliable, and maintainable user-facing systems under real load.

 - Architect and evolve large-scale frontend systems using React and Next.js that serve hundreds of thousands of users

 - Own performance, reliability, and correctness across critical user flows, including rendering performance, state management, and data fetching

 - Design frontend abstractions and patterns that scale with team and product complexity, not just feature count

 - Work closely with backend and Solana engineers to define clean, efficient client–server boundaries

 - Lead complex frontend initiatives end to end, from technical design through implementation, rollout, and iteration

 - Set a high bar for code quality, testing, and operational readiness across the frontend codebase

 - Mentor and unblock other frontend engineers through design reviews, pairing, and hands-on guidance




WHO YOU ARE

 - A staff-level frontend engineer with deep experience building production React applications at scale

 - Have owned frontend systems used by large, real user bases, not just internal tools or small apps

 - Strong understanding of browser internals, rendering pipelines, performance optimisation, and modern frontend tooling

 - Comfortable designing systems that balance developer velocity, performance, and long-term maintainability

 - Deep experience with React, Next.js, and TypeScript; comfortable working close to the metal when needed

 - High-agency and ownership-driven, able to drive large initiatives with minimal guidance

 - Thoughtful about tradeoffs and able to make pragmatic decisions based on real-world constraints

 - Interested in crypto systems or high-scale consumer products, and excited by fast-moving environments




WHAT IT'S LIKE TO WORK HERE

 - We work in person

 - Hours can be long and unconventional

 - The pace is intense

 - Expectations are high, and impact is immediate

 - Working at Baton is not for everyone




WHY JOIN US?

 - Unmatched ownership and autonomy

 - The ability to ship fast and see real-world impact immediately

If you’re motivated by responsibility, speed, and building products used by massive audiences, you’ll feel at home here.

source_jobs.title: Senior Staff Full Stack Engineer ($500k - $1.5m salary)
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Baton Corporation is the development company that builds and operates the entire technology stack behind pump.fun https://pump.fun, the largest memecoin launchpad in production today. The systems are low latency, high throughput, live under constant load, and break if you get them wrong.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

As a Senior Staff Full Stack Engineer, you’ll remain deeply hands-on while shaping the technical direction of our platform across frontend and backend systems. You’ll own the hardest cross-stack problems - performance, scalability, correctness, and architectural coherence in a fast-moving environment

 - Architect and build high-performance systems across the entire stack, directly contributing production code in both frontend and backend layers

 - Define and evolve cross-stack architecture that scales with user growth, product complexity, and real-time interaction demands

 - Lead complex, multi-surface initiatives end to end - from system design and RFC through implementation, rollout, and iteration

 - Design clean boundaries between frontend, backend, and blockchain infrastructure, ensuring systems remain modular and adaptable as we scale

 - Anticipate systemic bottlenecks (performance, data consistency, infra limits) and proactively design durable solutions

 - Drive improvements in performance, reliability, and observability across the stack

 - Rapidly prototype and validate new product ideas while ensuring that successful experiments evolve into production-grade systems

 - Raise the bar for engineering quality through design reviews, architectural guidance, and hands-on mentorship

 - Act as a technical anchor during critical launches, migrations, or incidents that span multiple parts of the stack

 - Improve developer velocity by evolving tooling, CI/CD pipelines, testing strategy, and shared abstractions




WHO YOU ARE

 - Proven track record of owning large cross-stack systems serving real users under real load

 - Deep expertise in TypeScript, React, Next.js, and Node.js (or equivalent backend frameworks), with strong architectural instincts

 - Comfortable reasoning about distributed systems, data modelling, caching, and client–server tradeoffs

 - Able to move fluidly between frontend performance optimisation and backend system design

 - Known for solving ambiguous, cross-cutting technical problems that span multiple layers of the stack

 - High-agency and execution-driven - you influence direction by building and shipping

 - Comfortable setting technical direction without stepping away from implementation

 - Experience in high-growth or high-scale environments where systems must evolve rapidly without collapsing under complexity

 - Familiar with crypto, DeFi, or blockchain systems - especially real-time interactions, indexing, or wallet-integrated applications




WHAT IT'S LIKE TO WORK HERE

 - We work in person

 - Hours can be long and unconventional

 - Expectations are high, and impact is immediate

If you’re motivated by responsibility, speed, and building products used by massive audiences, you’ll feel at home here.

source_jobs.title: Chief Legal Officer (CLO) ($1M-$5M salary)
source_jobs.description:
1. THE OPPORTUNITY

Baton Corporation is the development company that builds and maintains pump.fun http://pump.fun — the dominant memecoin launchpad on Solana, processing $300M+ daily volume. Last year pump.fun http://pump.fun generated more than $500M in profit with a team of fewer than 100 people.

We are a technology development company with our operational centre in New York, NY, serving hundreds of thousands of users globally — across the US, EU, Asia, and beyond. Our legal and regulatory environment is complex, fast-moving, and consequential. We are creating this role because we need someone who can own it.

This is a newly created, senior in-house position reporting directly to the General Counsel. The successful candidate will serve as the principal legal advisor across regulatory affairs, product counsel, corporate governance, and cross-border compliance. The role demands technical legal depth combined with the pragmatic, commercial instinct of someone comfortable operating at pace, in an environment with low bureaucracy and high expectations.



2. SCOPE OF RESPONSIBILITIES

Regulatory Affairs & Digital Asset Compliance

 - Serve as the primary internal expert on US digital asset regulation — SEC, CFTC, FinCEN, OFAC — providing timely, well-reasoned guidance across product, engineering, and commercial teams.

 - Own and manage the company's global regulatory posture across UK (FCA), EU (MiCA/DORA), and APAC jurisdictions; identify exposure and develop defensible compliance frameworks.

 - Lead regulatory engagement: respond to inquiries, manage investigations, and represent the company in proceedings alongside outside counsel.

 - Monitor legislative and regulatory developments across all relevant jurisdictions and translate them into actionable recommendations for senior leadership.

 - Oversee AML/KYC programme integrity in collaboration with the Head of Compliance, ensuring frameworks are robust, current, and audit-ready.

Product & Commercial Counsel

 - Provide timely legal review for all product launches, feature expansions, and go-to-market activities across multiple jurisdictions.

 - Draft, negotiate, and manage all commercial contracts: partnerships, exchange listings, data and API agreements, vendor relationships, and enterprise arrangements.

 - Advise on data privacy obligations (GDPR, CCPA) and consumer protection requirements embedded in product design and terms of service.

 - Review marketing and promotional materials for regulatory compliance across relevant markets.

Corporate Governance & Litigation

 - Advise on corporate governance and board matters across the UK parent entity and any US or international subsidiaries.

 - Lead the company's response to litigation, class actions, and law enforcement requests; manage outside counsel relationships effectively, controlling quality and cost.

 - Oversee IP strategy including trademark registration, brand protection, and global enforcement.

 - Manage cross-border corporate structuring matters as the company's legal footprint evolves.

Legal Operations & Team Building

 - Identify emerging legal risks before they become existential; build scalable internal processes that the business can actually use.

 - Manage and develop outside counsel panel relationships — driving quality up and costs down.

 - Contribute to building a world-class legal function appropriate to the company's scale and ambition.

3. CANDIDATE PROFILE

Qualifications & Experience

 - JD from an accredited US law school; admitted to the New York Bar or eligible for admission on motion. Additional UK or international qualifications are a plus.

 - 10+ years of legal experience, combining top-tier law firm practice with meaningful in-house time in crypto, fintech, payments, or regulated financial services.

 - Deep, practitioner-level knowledge of US digital asset regulation — you understand the current state of SEC/CFTC jurisdiction, FinCEN expectations, and OFAC sanctions compliance

 - Oversee AML/KYC programme integrity in collaboration with the Head of Compliance, ensuring frameworks are robust, current, and audit-ready.

Product & Commercial Counsel

 - Provide timely legal review for all product launches, feature expansions, and go-to-market activities across multiple jurisdictions.

 - Draft, negotiate, and manage all commercial contracts: partnerships, exchange listings, data and API agreements, vendor relationships, and enterprise arrangements.

 - Advise on data privacy obligations (GDPR, CCPA) and consumer protection requirements embedded in product design and terms of service.

 - Review marketing and promotional materials for regulatory compliance across relevant markets.

Corporate Governance & Litigation

 - Advise on corporate governance and board matters across the UK parent entity and any US or international subsidiaries.

 - Lead the company's response to litigation, class actions, and law enforcement requests; manage outside counsel relationships effectively, controlling quality and cost.

 - Oversee IP strategy including trademark registration, brand protection, and global enforcement.

 - Manage cross-border corporate structuring matters as the company's legal footprint evolves.

Legal Operations & Team Building

 - Identify emerging legal risks before they become existential; build scalable internal processes that the business can actually use.

 - Manage and develop outside counsel panel relationships — driving quality up and costs down.

 - Contribute to building a world-class legal function appropriate to the company's scale and ambition.

3. CANDIDATE PROFILE

Qualifications & Experience

 - JD from an accredited US law school; admitted to the New York Bar or eligible for admission on motion. Additional UK or international qualifications are a plus.

 - 10+ years of legal experience, combining top-tier law firm practice with meaningful in-house time in crypto, fintech, payments, or regulated financial services.

 - Deep, practitioner-level knowledge of US digital asset regulation — you understand the current state of SEC/CFTC jurisdiction, FinCEN expectations, and OFAC sanctions compliance

source_jobs.title: Growth Marketing Lead
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Baton Corporation builds and maintains pump.fun http://pump.fun — the dominant memecoin launchpad, processing $300M+ in daily volume. Last year, pump.fun http://pump.fun generated over $500M in profit with a team of fewer than 100 people.

We ship to production daily. Bureaucracy is minimal. We solve hard technical and go-to-market problems at scale, and we're data-driven — systematic tools and the scientific method decide what works, not opinions.

Working with us isn't for everyone. We work in person. Hours are long and sometimes strange. The pace is intense. Individuals own their function end to end. When we ship a change, it reaches hundreds of thousands of users within days.




THE ROLE

We're looking for a Growth Marketing Lead to build and run our growth function from the ground up — the strategy, the content, the paid channels, the team, and the compliance guardrails that let us move fast without moving recklessly.

This is a hands-on, builder role, not a "manage an agency and review decks" job. You'll be in the weeds on content and campaigns while building the team underneath you as we scale.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own growth strategy end-to-end — set the roadmap for user acquisition and engagement, and be accountable for the numbers behind it.

 - Build and lead the team — hire, onboard, and manage the growth marketers, creators, and specialists needed to scale aggressively.

 - Run paid acquisition across Meta (Facebook/Instagram), Google Ads, TikTok Ads, TikTok Shop, X Ads, and other platforms as they become relevant.

 - Drive organic and creator-led growth through UGC and clipping strategies — sourcing, briefing, and scaling content that performs.

 - Generate and test ideas constantly — you're not waiting for a brief, you're bringing the brief.

 - Partner closely with Legal and General Counsel to make sure every growth strategy and campaign fits within our compliance framework — non-negotiable given the regulatory environment we operate in.

 - Report on and iterate against performance — kill what doesn't work, scale what does, fast.




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - A few years of experience scaling a consumer product — as a growth hacker/marketer inside a consumer app (social, health/fitness, consumer fintech, mobile gaming), or at an agency that ran growth for products like these.

 - Hands-on channel experience with UGC, clipping/content strategies, and paid social/search (Meta, Google, TikTok, X).

 - A scrappy, high-energy operator mindset — you're hungry, hands-on, and thrive in a fast-paced, resource-lean environment where you're building the playbook as you go, not just running someone else's.

 - Comfort with ambiguity and pace — you don't need a fully mapped org or process to start moving.




NICE TO HAVE

 - Crypto experience — as a retail trader, or through work at a crypto startup or larger crypto company.

 - TradFi experience — exposure to how growth, marketing, or compliance works in traditional finance.

 - Experience working alongside legal/compliance teams on regulated or sensitive marketing content.

 

If you're the kind of operator who'd rather ship the campaign than write the deck about it — this is your role.

notes: Highly technical roles, high salary ranges, and fast-paced environment suggest a well-funded startup with a strong engineering focus.
